carryForwardCandidates.title: Public app remains read-first
carryForwardCandidates.why: The public ChatGPT App surface remains limited to read-only tools and keeps canonical write paths in Augnes Core.

carryForwardCandidates.title: Evidence index resolves shown evidence IDs
carryForwardCandidates.why: File-backed search and fetch resolve the evidence IDs surfaced by Working View and Casefile fixtures.

carryForwardCandidates.title: Continuity report now reads from file mode
carryForwardCandidates.why: File-backed get_continuity_report exposes the latest boundary id without making the ChatGPT thread canonical memory.

traceCapsuleCandidates.title: Resume flow after tool wait
traceCapsuleCandidates.reuseValue: Useful for preserving read context across ChatGPT tool waits without promoting narrator text as evidence.

lineageNotes: No overwrite; boundary packet extends prior chain.
File-backed boundary packet resolves continuity latestBoundaryId.
